title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 660.525 - Treatment for child sexual abuse victims provided by division, when
text:
660.525.  Treatment for child sexual abuse victims provided by division, when. — The children's division may provide treatment services for child sexual abuse victims in instances where the perpetrator is not listed in section 210.110 as a person responsible for the care, custody and control of the child, if treatment funds are available and such treatment services are requested by the family of the child.
(L. 1990 H.B. 1370, et al. § 4, A.L. 2014 H.B. 1299 Revision)
